references.hebrew: לֹֽא־תִקֹּ֤ם וְלֹֽא־תִטֹּר֙ אֶת־בְּנֵ֣י עַמֶּ֔ךָ וְאָֽהַבְתָּ֥ לְרֵעֲךָ֖ כָּמ֑וֹךָ אֲנִ֖י יְהֹוָֽה׃
references.english: You shall not take vengeance or bear a grudge against members of your people. Love your fellowffellow See note at v. 13, and cf. v. 34. as yourself: I am GOD.
references.matched_snippet: לרעך כמוך וחי אחיך עמך שהוא עני ואין

references.hebrew: לֹֽא־תִשְׂנָ֥א אֶת־אָחִ֖יךָ בִּלְבָבֶ֑ךָ הוֹכֵ֤חַ תּוֹכִ֙יחַ֙ אֶת־עֲמִיתֶ֔ךָ וְלֹא־תִשָּׂ֥א עָלָ֖יו חֵֽטְא׃
references.english: You shall not hate your kinsfolk in your heart. Reprove your kindred butebut Exact force of we- uncertain. incur no guilt on their account.
references.matched_snippet: ועל לא תשנא את אחיך בלבבך ואהבת

references.hebrew: אַל־תִּקַּ֤ח מֵֽאִתּוֹ֙ נֶ֣שֶׁךְ וְתַרְבִּ֔ית וְיָרֵ֖אתָ מֵֽאֱלֹהֶ֑יךָ וְחֵ֥י אָחִ֖יךָ עִמָּֽךְ׃
references.english: do not exact advance or accrued interest,gadvance or accrued interest I.e., interest deducted in advance, or interest added at the time of repayment. but fear your God. Let your kin live by your side as such.
references.matched_snippet: לרעך כמוך וחי אחיך עמך שהוא עני ואין
